entry.name: Tegile_IntelliFlash_Projects_API
entry.description:
Monitors Tegile project storage/data metrics.
Tegile Projects are common organizational templates that create logical containers for volumes based on their specific purpose – like virtual desktop images and file shares.

attribute.name: scriptgroovy

datapoint.name: copies
datapoint.description:
Specifies number of the project copies.
Supported values: - 1 (default) - 2 - 3

datapoint.name: dedup
datapoint.description:
Turns on or off deduplication on the project.
Supported values: - on (default) - off

datapoint.name: defaultVolumeSizeInByte
datapoint.description:
Default volume size (bytes).
The value should be greater than or equal to 1 MB (1048576 bytes). The default value is 1 GB.

datapoint.name: quotaEnabled
datapoint.description: Checks whether quota is enabled on the project (true or false).

datapoint.name: quotaInByte
datapoint.description:
Enables quota on the project if intended for NFS use.
The value should be greater than or equal to 1 MB (1048576 bytes).
When this value == 0, no quota is assigned to the project.

datapoint.name: Average_Latency
datapoint.description: Average latency, in millisecond, for read/write operations.

datapoint.name: Read_Latency
datapoint.description: Read operation latency, in milliseconds.

datapoint.name: Read_MBps
datapoint.description: Read throughput data, in megabytes/sec.

datapoint.name: Read_Ops
datapoint.description: Number of read operations/sec.

datapoint.name: Total_MBps
datapoint.description: Total Read/Write throughput data, in megabytes/sec.

datapoint.name: Total_Ops
datapoint.description: Total number of read/write operations/sec.

datapoint.name: Write_Latency
datapoint.description: Write operation latency, in milliseconds.

datapoint.name: Write_MBps
datapoint.description: Write throughput data, in megabytes/sec.

datapoint.name: Write_Ops
datapoint.description: Number of write operations/sec.

datapoint.name: available
datapoint.description:
For datasets with a quota, this represents the amount of space remaining in the quota.
For shares and luns without a quota, this represents the amount of space remaining in the project's quota (if it exists).
If a quota does not exist on a project, this value represents the amount of space (in bytes) remaining on the pool.

datapoint.name: originalUsedByDataAndSnapshot
datapoint.description: Original used by dataset data and snapshot before compression (bytes).

datapoint.name: usedByData
datapoint.description: Amount used by this dataset's data after compression (bytes).

datapoint.name: usedByDataAndSnapshot
datapoint.description: Amount used by the dataset data and snapshot after compression (bytes).

datapoint.name: usedByReservation
datapoint.description: Share and project field. Amount used by reservation (bytes).

datapoint.name: usedBySnapshot
datapoint.description: Amount used by this dataset's snapshots after compression (bytes).

datapoint.name: volSize
datapoint.description: Volume only field. The size of the volume (bytes).

datapoint.name: Read_Bytes
datapoint.description: Read throughput data, in bytes/sec.

datapoint.name: Total_Bytes
datapoint.description: Total Read/Write throughput data, in bytes/sec.

datapoint.name: Write_Bytes
datapoint.description: Write throughput data, in bytes/sec.

datapoint.name: storageUtilization
datapoint.alertbody:
Project ##INSTANCE## on Tegile Array ##HOST## has reported that ##VALUE## % of total storage capacity is now utilized, placing the project into ##LEVEL## state.
This started at ##START##, -- or ##DURATION## ago.
datapoint.description: Percent of available project storage utilized.

datapoint.name: compressionSavingsPercentage
datapoint.description: Amount saved from compression as a percentage.

overviewgraph.name: Top Projects by Avg. R/W Latency
overviewgraph.title: Top Projects by Avg. R/W Latency
